$schema: Italy Trip Itinerary — single source of truth. EN + ZH inline per field. See itinerary-render.js for shape.

headerSubtitle.zh: 11天探索羅馬、拿坡里及普利亞

name.en: Rome Airbnb · near Santa Croce in Gerusalemme
name.zh: 羅馬 Airbnb · 鄰近 Santa Croce in Gerusalemme

stay.address: Piazza di Santa Croce in Gerusalemme, 1, Roma, Lazio 00185, Italia

activity.zh: ✈️ 抵達羅馬 FCO 機場（CX293）

info.en: Disembark, immigration, baggage claim — about 60-90 min total
info.zh: 下機、入境、取行李 — 大約60-90分鐘

hint.en: Cathay Pacific CX293 — booked, confirmed
hint.zh: 國泰航空 CX293 — 已確認預訂

activity.zh: 🚄 Leonardo Express → Roma Termini

info.en: Direct airport train, 32 min from FCO to Termini. Then short taxi/Uber (~15 min, ~€18) to the Airbnb at Santa Croce in Gerusalemme
info.zh: 直達機場快線，由 FCO 到 Termini 約32分鐘。再短途的士/Uber（約15分鐘，€18）到 Santa Croce in Gerusalemme 嘅 Airbnb

note.zh: 🎫 Leonardo Express 每人 €14，每15分鐘一班

activity.zh: 放行李 + 第一杯意式咖啡

info.en: Coordinate with Airbnb host to drop luggage early (room may not be ready until 15:00). Grab a cappuccino + cornetto nearby to wake up after the long flight
info.zh: 同 Airbnb 房東協調早啲放行李（房間通常要15:00先準備好）。喺附近飲杯 cappuccino 配 cornetto，醒下個瞓

activity.zh: 羅馬鬥獸場（外觀 + 君士坦丁凱旋門）

info.en: Quick stop after dropping bags. Photos from outside, walk the perimeter, pose at the Arch of Constantine right next door. Skip the interior — saves 90 min and €18, and we head straight into the Forum next.
info.zh: 放低行李後第一站。喺外觀拍照，繞外圍一圈，到隔離嘅君士坦丁凱旋門合照。跳過內部 — 慳返90分鐘同€18，緊接住去羅馬廣場。

activity.en: Roman Forum walk-by (Via dei Fori Imperiali)
activity.zh: 羅馬廣場路邊觀景（帝國廣場大道）

info.en: Stroll along Via dei Fori Imperiali — the wide avenue runs above the Forum, free railings let you peek down at the Curia, Temple of Saturn and surviving columns. Best wide-angle photo comes a bit later from Capitoline Hill.
info.zh: 沿著帝國廣場大道漫步 — 這條大道從高處俯瞰廣場，免費欄杆邊可俯視元老院、農神廟和殘存的圓柱。稍後從卡比托利歐山上會看到最佳的廣角照片。

name.zh: 古羅馬廣場與帕拉蒂諾山

activity.zh: ⭐ 卡比托利歐觀景平台（羅馬廣場全景）

info.en: Climb the Cordonata stairs to Piazza del Campidoglio (Michelangelo design, free). Walk past the Marcus Aurelius statue and around to the Belvedere terrace behind Palazzo Senatorio — the iconic Forum panorama opens up below. This is the postcard shot, no ticket needed.
info.zh: 登上米開朗基羅設計的科爾多納塔階梯前往卡比托利歐廣場（免費）。經過馬庫斯·奧勒留雕像，繞到元老宮後面的觀景平台 — 標誌性的羅馬廣場全景就在腳下展開。這就是明信片照，無需門票。

activity.zh: ⭐ Sora Lella 午餐（台伯島）

info.en: Iconic Roman trattoria on Tiber Island, since 1940 — winner of '4 Ristoranti' as Rome's best restaurant. Walk through the Jewish Ghetto first (carciofi alla giudia photos at Boccione bakery), then cross the bridge to Sora Lella for sit-down lunch: 22-month prosciutto + burrata, gnocchi all'amatriciana, trippa alla romana, and a classic maritozzo for dessert.
info.zh: 台伯島上的傳奇羅馬餐館，1940年起家 — 義大利真人秀「4 Ristoranti」羅馬最佳餐廳得主。先穿過猶太區（在 Boccione 烘焙坊拍炸朝鮮薊照），再過橋到 Sora Lella 坐下吃：22個月熟成生火腿配布拉塔起司、阿瑪翠斯醬麵疙瘩、羅馬式牛肚，甜點當然是經典的生乳包。

comment.en: 📞 Reservations recommended — popular spot, especially for groups of 6.
comment.zh: 📞 建議訂位 — 熱門餐廳，6人以上更要訂。

location.mapsQuery: Trattoria Sora Lella, Via di Ponte Quattro Capi 16, Roma

hint.en: Reserve 2-3 days ahead via TheFork or phone
hint.zh: 提前2-3天透過 TheFork 或電話訂位

activity.zh: Trastevere 黃昏漫步

info.en: Charming cobblestone lanes, ivy-covered facades, and local artisan shops in Rome's most photogenic neighborhood — golden hour is magic here
info.zh: 迷人的鵝卵石小巷、常春藤外牆和本地工藝店 — 羅馬最上鏡的社區，黃昏時分特別美

name.zh: 聖母瑪利亞廣場（特拉斯提弗列）

location.mapsQuery: Piazza Santa Maria in Trastevere, Roma

activity.zh: Trastevere 歡迎晚餐

info.en: Try La Gattabuia — 1600s papal prison turned restaurant! Must-order: carbonara, stewed oxtail, roast lamb, Roman artichoke
info.zh: 推薦 La Gattabuia — 1600年教廷監獄改建的餐廳！必點：培根蛋麵 (Carbonara)、燉番茄牛尾、烤羊肉、羅馬式朝鮮薊

comment.en: 🍴 Alternative pick: Miraggio Trastevere (Via della Lungara 16A) — family-run since 1955, classics like coda alla vaccinara and trippa romana. 🍧 Or grab a Grattachecca (Roman shaved ice) at Sora Mirella nearby!
comment.zh: 🍴 替代選擇：Miraggio Trastevere（Via della Lungara 16A）— 1955年起家族經營，招牌燉牛尾和羅馬式牛肚。🍧 或到附近的 Sora Mirella 嚐 Grattachecca（羅馬傳統水果剉冰）！

name.zh: La Gattabuia 餐廳·Via del Porto 1

location.mapsQuery: La Gattabuia · Via del Porto 1, Roma

hint.en: Reserve 1-2 days ahead — popular Trastevere spot
hint.zh: 提前1-2天訂位 — 熱門 Trastevere 餐廳

label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 羅馬（第2晚／共3晚）

name.en: Rome Airbnb · near Santa Croce in Gerusalemme
name.zh: 羅馬 Airbnb · 鄰近 Santa Croce in Gerusalemme

stay.address: Piazza di Santa Croce in Gerusalemme, 1, Roma, Lazio 00185, Italia

activity.zh: ⭐ 梵蒂岡博物館（早場入場）

info.en: Early entry guided tour — get inside before 8am public opening, experience Sistine Chapel nearly empty!
info.zh: 早鳥入場導覽團 — 在早上8點公眾開放前進入，幾乎包場欣賞西斯廷禮拜堂！

note.zh: 早鳥入場 + 導遊，約3小時

hint.en: Book 60+ days ahead — early entry slots sell out
hint.zh: 提前60+天預訂 — 早場名額會售罄

activity.zh: ⭐ 西斯汀教堂

info.en: Michelangelo's ceiling masterpiece - The Creation of Adam
info.zh: 米開朗基羅的天花板傑作 - 創造亞當

comment.en: 📸 No photos allowed inside, but memories last forever
comment.zh: 📸 教堂內不准拍照，但回憶永存

hint.en: Same Vatican ticket includes Sistine Chapel
hint.zh: 同梵蒂岡門票已包含西斯汀禮拜堂

activity.zh: ⭐ 聖伯多祿大殿

info.en: World's largest church - Michelangelo's Pietà
info.zh: 世界最大教堂 - 米開朗基羅的聖殤像

comment.en: 🗼 Climb the dome for panoramic Rome views (551 steps!)
comment.zh: 🗼 登上圓頂俯瞰羅馬全景（551級階梯！）

activity.en: ⭐ Trionfale lunch: Forno Feliziani + Mercato Trionfale
activity.zh: ⭐ Trionfale 區午餐：Forno Feliziani + Trionfale 市場

info.en: Roman pizza al taglio crawl through the Trionfale district. Start at Forno Feliziani (Via Candia 61) for thick-crust slices — try the broccoli/mushroom. Then walk to Mercato Trionfale (Via Andrea Doria) for the legendary porchetta panini (€3.5, host's #1 pick of the day) and Chef Box's fresh handmade pasta — Cozze Pecorino or Faraona Tartufo (~€23 for 2 plates).
info.zh: 在 Trionfale 區掃街吃羅馬式披薩。先到 Forno Feliziani（Via Candia 61）品嚐厚皮披薩 — 推薦花椰菜香菇口味。再走到 Trionfale 市場（Via Andrea Doria）吃傳奇的脆皮烤豬肉帕尼尼（€3.5，YouTuber 當日最愛！）和 Chef Box 的新鮮手工義大利麵 — 淡菜羊乾酪或珍珠雞松露（約 €23 兩盤）。

activity.zh: Panificio Bonci（生乳包甜點）

info.en: Gabriele Bonci's bakery on Via Trionfale, ~600m walk from the market. Their maritozzo is rated the 'ceiling' of Rome — soft milk-bread roll split open and stuffed with a giant pillow of unsweetened whipped cream. Perfect dessert before walking south to Castel Sant'Angelo.
info.zh: Gabriele Bonci 在 Via Trionfale 的麵包店，距市場約 600 公尺。他們的生乳包被評為「羅馬天花板」— 鬆軟的牛奶麵包剖開夾入巨大的無糖鮮奶油。在往南走到聖天使城堡之前的完美甜點。

activity.zh: 聖天使城堡

info.en: Papal fortress with Tiber river views
info.zh: 教皇堡壘，可欣賞台伯河景色

hint.en: Buy timed-entry ticket online to skip queue
hint.zh: 網上購買限時入場券免排隊

activity.zh: 傍晚散步

info.en: Walk along the Tiber, enjoy Rome at dusk
info.zh: 沿台伯河漫步，欣賞黃昏羅馬

picture.alt: Roman pasta dinner — Bottega Trattoria De Santis

activity.en: ⭐ Farewell Rome Dinner — Bottega Trattoria De Santis
activity.zh: ⭐ 羅馬告別晚餐 — Bottega Trattoria De Santis

info.en: Modern Roman trattoria literally next door to the Airbnb. Specialties: carbonara, cacio e pepe, spaghettone with burrata & shrimp tartare. Friendly service, fair prices.
info.zh: 現代羅馬式小館，就在 Airbnb 隔鄰。招牌：培根蛋麵、起司胡椒麵、布拉塔蝦韃靼粗麵。服務親切、價格合理。

comment.en: 📞 Reserve 1-2 days ahead — TripAdvisor / Quandoo bookable.
comment.zh: 📞 建議提前1-2天預訂 — 可透過 TripAdvisor / Quandoo 預約。

hint.en: Reserve 1-2 days ahead — small trattoria
hint.zh: 提前1-2天訂位 — 小型 trattoria

label.en: Tonight's Stay · Rome (night 3 of 3 — checkout tomorrow)
label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 羅馬（第3晚／共3晚 — 明天退房）

name.en: Rome Airbnb · near Santa Croce in Gerusalemme
name.zh: 羅馬 Airbnb · 鄰近 Santa Croce in Gerusalemme

stay.address: Piazza di Santa Croce in Gerusalemme, 1, Roma, Lazio 00185, Italia

activity.zh: ⭐ 特雷維噴泉（日出時分，無人）

info.en: Arrive early to a near-empty piazza and golden-hour light on the Baroque marble. Toss a coin (right hand over left shoulder) — Roman tradition says you'll return.
info.zh: 提早抵達幾乎無人的廣場，享受巴洛克大理石上的黃金時刻光線。投入一枚硬幣（右手越過左肩）— 羅馬傳說你將會再來。

comment.en: 📸 By 8am the piazza fills with tour groups — leave before 7:30 for clean photos. 🍝 FYI: Baccano (Via delle Muratte 23, 50m away) is widely rated Rome's champion carbonara — chef Nabil Hassen, ex-Roscioli. Worth a return trip later in the day.
comment.zh: 📸 早上8點後廣場會擠滿旅行團 — 7:30前離開可拍到乾淨照片。🍝 順帶一提：Baccano（Via delle Muratte 23，距特雷維 50公尺）被公認為羅馬冠軍培根蛋麵 — 主廚 Nabil Hassen 來自 Roscioli。值得稍後再回來吃一次。

activity.zh: 西班牙階梯與西班牙廣場（趁早）

info.en: Walk from Piazza Navona (~10 min). Arrive before 8:30 for empty steps and clean photos before the tour groups roll in. Stop by Antico Caffè Greco (Via dei Condotti 86) — 200+ year-old café — if anyone needs a second espresso.
info.zh: 由納沃納廣場行過嚟（約10分鐘）。8:30前到達可以拍到無人嘅階梯，趁旅行團未到。到 Antico Caffè Greco（孔多蒂街86號）小歇 — 超過200年歷史咖啡館。

name.zh: 西班牙階梯與西班牙廣場

activity.zh: 博爾蓋塞別墅花園

info.en: Walk up the Pincio steps from Piazza di Spagna into Rome's most beautiful park — leisurely stroll through the gardens, rent a rowboat on the Laghetto if you want a 20-min break. Easy 90-min visit before walking down to Popolo.
info.zh: 由西班牙廣場行上 Pincio 階梯，進入羅馬最美公園 — 悠閒漫步花園，想休息可以喺 Laghetto 湖上租划艇20分鐘。輕鬆90分鐘行程，之後行落 Popolo。

activity.zh: 人民廣場（從平喬山步行而下）

info.en: Walk down from Pincio terrace into the oval Piazza del Popolo — twin churches, central obelisk. 15-min photo stop before walking south to the Pantheon for noon god-light.
info.zh: 從平喬觀景台步行而下，進入橢圓形的人民廣場 — 雙子教堂與中央方尖碑。15分鐘影相停留，再向南行去萬神殿趕中午神聖光柱。

activity.zh: ⭐ 萬神殿內部（神聖光柱 ☀️）

info.en: Solar noon (~13:08) lands the oculus beam near the floor center — visit between 11:45 and 13:00 for the strongest 'god light' on the dome's coffered interior.
info.zh: 太陽正午（約13:08）光柱落在地板中央附近 — 在11:45至13:00之間造訪，可看到最強烈的「神聖光柱」打在穹頂藻井內部。

comment.en: 🍦 Walking out: Giolitti for Rome's best gelato (~150m, Via degli Uffici del Vicario), Tazza d'Oro for another shot of espresso right next to the Pantheon.
comment.zh: 🍦 離開時：步行約150公尺到喬利蒂（Giolitti）品嚐羅馬最棒的冰淇淋，或到萬神殿旁的金杯咖啡（Tazza d'Oro）再來一杯濃縮咖啡。

activity.zh: Sant'Eustachio 咖啡館（傳奇義式濃縮咖啡）

info.en: Tucked behind the Pantheon (~3 min walk), one of Rome's most famous espresso spots. The secret-recipe gran caffè (whipped foam on espresso) is the signature. Stand at the marble counter like locals — quick pause before lunch.
info.zh: 藏身於萬神殿後方（步行約3分鐘），羅馬最著名的義式濃縮咖啡店之一 — 招牌是秘製配方的 gran caffè（濃縮咖啡上的奶泡）。像當地人一樣站在大理石吧檯前；午餐前快速一站。

comment.en: 💡 Alternative: Tazza d'Oro at the Pantheon, equally legendary. Pick whichever is less crowded.
comment.zh: 💡 替代選擇：萬神殿旁的金杯咖啡（Tazza d'Oro），同樣傳奇。哪間人少就去哪間。

activity.zh: 阿根廷塔廣場（貓咪保護區）

info.en: Sunken Republican-era ruins where Caesar was assassinated, now a famous Roman cat sanctuary. 5-min stop from street level — peek down, wave at the cats, head to lunch nearby.
info.zh: 下沉式的共和時期遺跡，凱撒遇刺之地，現為著名的羅馬貓咪保護區。從街道層觀看 — 探頭看看，跟貓咪揮揮手，再去附近食午餐。

activity.zh: ⭐ Grappolo d'Oro 午餐（培根蛋麵！）

info.en: Hosteria Grappolo d'Oro at Piazza della Cancelleria 80 — last block before Campo de' Fiori. Michelin Bib Gourmand + Gambero Rosso 'Champion of Tradition' for carbonara at €14. Roman classics done right (cacio e pepe, amatriciana, too). Family-run since 2000.
info.zh: Hosteria Grappolo d'Oro，Piazza della Cancelleria 80號 — 鮮花廣場前最後一個街區。Michelin Bib Gourmand + Gambero Rosso「傳統冠軍」嘅培根蛋麵，€14。羅馬經典做得好（cacio e pepe、amatriciana 都得）。2000年起家族經營。

comment.en: 📞 Book online — 30-day rolling window, June 5 booking opens May 6. 🥈 Backup: La Carbonara on Campo de' Fiori (Quandoo bookable any time, €15 carbonara, Gambero Rosso top-10).
comment.zh: 📞 網上訂位 — 30日預訂窗口，6月5日由5月6日開始可訂。🥈 後備：鮮花廣場的 La Carbonara（隨時可喺 Quandoo 訂，€15 培根蛋麵，Gambero Rosso 前十名）。

note.en: Carbonara €14 + drink + tip; no card hold
note.zh: 培根蛋麵 €14 + 飲品 + 小費；唔使預授權

location.mapsQuery: Hosteria Grappolo d'Oro, Piazza della Cancelleria 80, Roma

hint.en: 30-day rolling window — booking opens May 6, 2026
hint.zh: 30天滾動預約窗口 — 2026年5月6日開放預訂

activity.zh: 鮮花廣場（午後漫步）

info.en: Late-afternoon market wind-down, flower stalls and locals at the bars. Great spot for a sit-down spritz before the evening dinner.
info.zh: 傍晚市集收攤時分，花攤與酒吧裡的當地人。晚餐前坐下來喝杯氣泡飲料的絕佳地點。

picture.alt: Panorama from Giardino degli Aranci — Vittoriano, Capitoline, Roman skyline

activity.en: ⭐ Aventine Hill — Orange Garden + Knights of Malta keyhole
activity.zh: ⭐ 阿文提諾山 — 橘子園 + 馬爾他騎士團鑰匙孔奇景

info.en: Sunset stroll on the Aventine: panorama from Giardino degli Aranci over the Tiber, Forum Boarium, and St. Peter's dome — then walk 100m to the famous Knights of Malta keyhole to peep a perfectly framed view of the dome down a cypress alley. Free.
info.zh: 阿文提諾山的傍晚漫步：橘子園露台俯瞰台伯河、Forum Boarium 與聖彼得大教堂圓頂；步行100米到馬爾他騎士團鑰匙孔，從柏樹小徑窺看完美構圖的圓頂奇景。免費。

comment.en: 🚶 30-min walk from Campo de' Fiori — exactly the digestion stroll you want between carbonara lunch and La Campana dinner. Sunset in early June ~20:45.
comment.zh: 🚶 自 Campo de' Fiori 步行約30分鐘 — 正好是午餐培根蛋麵與晚餐之間的消化漫步。六月初日落約 20:45。

activity.zh: ⭐ La Campana 餐廳（羅馬最古老餐廳，1518年起）

info.en: 500-year-old trattoria in centro storico, near Pantheon/Piazza Navona. Order the things tourists never order: carciofo alla romana (braised artichoke), tagliolini alici e pecorino (anchovy + sheep cheese pasta), petto di vitella alla fornara (roast veal breast), animella di abbacchio (lamb sweetbreads). Save room for the warm apple pie + gelato.
info.zh: centro storico 500 年老店，鄰近萬神殿和納沃納廣場。點那些遊客從不點的菜：羅馬式燉朝鮮薊、鯷魚羊乾酪細麵、烘培者烤小牛胸肉、嫩煎羊胸線。記得留肚子吃招牌的暖蘋果派配 gelato。

comment.en: 📞 Reservations strongly recommended — small dining room, very popular with locals.
comment.zh: 📞 強烈建議訂位 — 用餐空間不大，當地人很愛來。

location.mapsQuery: Ristorante La Campana, Vicolo della Campana 18, Roma

hint.en: Reserve 2-3 days ahead for 20:30
hint.zh: 提前2-3天預訂 20:30 時段

label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 拿坡里（4晚）

name.zh: 拿坡里 Airbnb · Spaccanapoli 舊城區

stay.address: Via San Biagio dei Librai, 8 (3rd floor, first door right) · Napoli, Campania 80138, Italia

activity.zh: 退房 — 羅馬 Airbnb

info.en: Pack up, head to Roma Termini station (~15 min taxi from Santa Croce in Gerusalemme)
info.zh: 收拾行李，由 Santa Croce in Gerusalemme 乘的士前往 Roma Termini 車站（約15分鐘）

activity.zh: 🚄 高速列車前往拿坡里

info.en: Frecciarossa - only 1 hour 10 minutes!
info.zh: Frecciarossa - 僅需1小時10分鐘！

hint.en: Book Frecciarossa via Trenitalia or Italo — earlier = cheaper
hint.zh: 在 Trenitalia 或 Italo 預訂 Frecciarossa — 越早越平

activity.zh: 抵達 Napoli Centrale 並入住

info.en: Taxi or Metro Line 1 to Spaccanapoli (~10 min). Check-in at Via San Biagio dei Librai 8 — right in the heart of old Naples, walk to everything
info.zh: 乘的士或地鐵1號線前往 Spaccanapoli（約10分鐘），入住 Via San Biagio dei Librai 8 — 位於拿坡里舊城區心臟，步行可達各景點

activity.zh: ⭐ 正宗拿坡里薄餅

info.en: Naples = birthplace of pizza! Try L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele or Sorbillo
info.zh: 拿坡里 = 薄餅發源地！推薦 L'Antica Pizzeria da Michele 或 Sorbillo

comment.en: 🍕 Margherita DOP - the original and the best!
comment.zh: 🍕 Margherita DOP - 原創經典，無可比擬！

picture.alt: Alexander Mosaic (Battle of Issus) at MANN

activity.en: ⭐ Naples Archaeological Museum 考古博物館
activity.zh: ⭐ 拿坡里考古博物館

info.en: One of the world's great museums — Pompeii mosaics, Farnese Collection, ancient Roman sculptures
info.zh: 世界級博物館 — 龐貝馬賽克、法爾內塞收藏、古羅馬雕塑

note.en: 🎫 Covered by Campania Artecard 3-day pass (includes 2 attractions + transport)
note.zh: 🎫 可使用 Campania Artecard 三日券（包含2個景點 + 交通）

name.zh: 那不勒斯國立考古博物館

hint.en: Covered by Campania Artecard 3-day pass
hint.zh: Campania Artecard 三日券已包含

activity.zh: ⭐ 聖塞維羅小堂（蒙紗基督）

info.en: Sanmartino's 1753 marble masterpiece — Christ's body draped in translucent marble veil, carved from a single block. One of the most astonishing sculptures in the world. Also see Disinganno and Pudicizia in the same chapel.
info.zh: Sanmartino 1753年大理石傑作 — 基督遺體覆蓋著薄如蟬翼的大理石面紗，由一整塊石料雕成，被譽為世上最震撼的雕塑之一。同一禮拜堂內亦可欣賞《幻滅》與《貞節》兩件名作。

comment.en: 📞 Book online — tickets release 60 days ahead and slots sell out. Closed Tuesdays. 9am-7pm, last entry 6:30pm. No photos inside.
comment.zh: 📞 必須網上預訂 — 提前60天開放，時段秒殺。星期二休館。開放時間 9am-7pm（最後入場 6:30pm）。室內禁止拍照。

note.zh: 成人 €10 + 語音導覽 €3.50（自選）

location.mapsQuery: Museo Cappella Sansevero, Via Francesco de Sanctis 19, Napoli

hint.en: 60-day rolling window — booking opens Apr 7, 2026; slots sell out fast
hint.zh: 60天滾動預約窗口 — 2026年4月7日開放，名額秒殺

picture.alt: Spaccanapoli — aerial view from Castel Sant'Elmo showing the street splitting Naples

activity.en: Spaccanapoli — the street that splits Naples
activity.zh: Spaccanapoli — 把拿坡里劈成兩半的長街

info.en: The vibrant straight-line decumanus that cuts Naples in half — best appreciated from above (you'll see it from Castel Sant'Elmo next). Walk Via San Biagio dei Librai → Via Benedetto Croce: bookshops, presepe artisans, sfogliatelle, churches, and the Airbnb is right on this street.
info.zh: 把拿坡里舊城區劈成兩半的筆直街道 — 從高處看最震撼（稍後在 Castel Sant'Elmo 城堡可俯瞰）。從 Via San Biagio dei Librai 走到 Via Benedetto Croce：書店、傳統聖誕馬槽工匠、sfogliatelle 千層酥、教堂，Airbnb 就在這條街上。

name.zh: 斯帕卡那不勒斯（歷史中心）

activity.en: ⭐ Castel Sant'Elmo 聖埃爾莫城堡 — Night View
activity.zh: ⭐ 聖埃爾莫城堡 — 夜景

info.en: Medieval hilltop fortress with 360° panoramic views of Naples, Vesuvius, and the bay — stunning at sunset
info.zh: 中世紀山頂堡壘，360°全景俯瞰拿坡里、維蘇威火山及海灣 — 日落時分格外壯麗

note.en: 🎫 €5 per person | Take Funicular Centrale up
note.zh: 🎫 每人 €5 | 乘 Funicular Centrale 纜車上山

hint.en: Covered by Campania Artecard; €5 standalone
hint.zh: Campania Artecard 已包含；單獨購票 €5

activity.en: ⭐ Naples Seafood Dinner — La Locanda Gesù Vecchio
activity.zh: ⭐ 拿坡里海鮮晚餐 — La Locanda Gesù Vecchio

info.en: Casual seafood spot tucked off Spaccanapoli — fresh fried calamari, spaghetti alle vongole, marinated anchovies. Yellow tablecloths, intimate vibe.
info.zh: Spaccanapoli 旁的休閒海鮮小店 — 新鮮炸魷魚、蛤蜊麵、醃鯷魚。黃色桌布、舒適氛圍。

comment.en: 📞 Reserve via TheFork or by phone — gets busy.
comment.zh: 📞 透過 TheFork 或電話預訂 — 經常客滿。

hint.en: Reserve via TheFork — small seafood spot
hint.zh: 透過 TheFork 預訂 — 小型海鮮餐廳

label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 拿坡里（第2晚／共4晚）

name.zh: 拿坡里 Airbnb · Spaccanapoli 舊城區

stay.address: Via San Biagio dei Librai, 8 (3rd floor, first door right) · Napoli, Campania 80138, Italia

activity.zh: 渡輪前往卡普里

info.en: High-speed ferry from Naples Port (Molo Beverello)
info.zh: 從拿坡里港口 (Molo Beverello) 乘高速渡輪

name.zh: 貝弗雷洛碼頭（渡輪碼頭）

hint.en: Book Caremar/SNAV ferry day before; arrive 30 min early
hint.zh: 前一天預訂 Caremar/SNAV 渡輪；提前30分鐘到達

activity.zh: ⭐ 藍洞 Grotta Azzurra (Blue Grotto)

info.en: World-famous sea cave with magical blue light
info.zh: 世界著名海蝕洞，夢幻藍光

comment.en: 🌊 Boat from Marina Grande → queue at cave entrance → small rowboat into the grotto. Allow 3+ hours for the full excursion
comment.zh: 🌊 從 Marina Grande 搭船 → 在洞口排隊 → 小划艇進入藍洞。整個行程需預留3小時以上

note.zh: 🚤 從 Marina Grande 搭船：約 €18 + €4 入場費

hint.en: Weather-dependent — closed in rough sea; backup: round-island boat
hint.zh: 視天氣而定 — 海浪大會關閉；備案：環島遊船

activity.zh: 觀景午餐

info.en: Fresh seafood, ravioli capresi, limoncello
info.zh: 新鮮海鮮、ravioli capresi、limoncello

activity.zh: 卡普里小鎮及小廣場

info.en: Glamorous town square, luxury shopping, people watching
info.zh: 迷人的小鎮廣場、奢華購物、街頭漫步

name.zh: 卡普里小廣場（翁貝托一世廣場）

activity.zh: 纜車上索拉羅山

info.en: Highest point of Capri (589m) - 360° views of the bay & Faraglioni rocks
info.zh: 卡普里最高點（589米）- 海灣及 Faraglioni 岩石360°全景

note.en: 🚡 Chairlift: ~€12 round trip, 13 min each way

hint.en: Buy chairlift ticket at base — €14 round-trip
hint.zh: 纜車票於山腳購買 — 來回 €14

activity.zh: Anacapri 與聖米歇爾別墅

info.en: Beautiful gardens with panoramic views
info.zh: 美麗花園及全景觀景台

name.zh: 聖米歇爾別墅（阿納卡普里）

hint.en: Villa San Michele entrance €10 — buy at gate
hint.zh: 聖米歇爾別墅入場 €10 — 現場購票

activity.zh: 渡輪返回拿坡里

info.en: Return to mainland
info.zh: 返回大陸

hint.en: Last ferry typically 18:30 — buy round-trip in morning to lock seat
hint.zh: 末班渡輪通常 18:30 — 早上買來回票鎖位

activity.zh: 拿坡里晚餐 — La Taverna dell'Arte

info.en: Slow Food trattoria inside a quiet palazzo just off Spaccanapoli. Local ingredients, warm lighting, soft jazz. After Capri this is a calm wind-down.
info.zh: 藏於 Spaccanapoli 一座靜謐宮殿內的慢食小館。在地食材、溫暖燈光、輕柔爵士。從卡布里返回後正好放慢節奏。

hint.en: Reserve same morning
hint.zh: 當日早上訂位

city.zh: 波西塔諾 / 阿馬爾菲

label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 拿坡里（第3晚／共4晚）

name.zh: 拿坡里 Airbnb · Spaccanapoli 舊城區

stay.address: Via San Biagio dei Librai, 8 (3rd floor, first door right) · Napoli, Campania 80138, Italia

activity.en: Quick Breakfast & Walk to Pickup Point
activity.zh: 快速早餐 + 步行去接送點

info.en: Coffee + cornetto near the Airbnb. Walk/short taxi to C.So Arnaldo Lucci (~25min walk or ~€8 taxi from Spaccanapoli) — pickup point near Napoli Centrale station
info.zh: Airbnb 附近飲杯咖啡食件 cornetto。然後步行/短途的士去 C.So Arnaldo Lucci（Spaccanapoli 步行約25分鐘 / 的士約€8）— 接送點喺拿坡里中央車站附近

activity.en: Amalfi Tour: 🚌 TRAMVIA Bus Pickup at C.So Arnaldo Lucci
activity.zh: 阿馬爾菲導賞團：🚌 TRAMVIA 巴士喺 C.So Arnaldo Lucci 接客

info.en: Booked tour: TRAMVIA - Beducci Travel Bus. Group bus tour with free exploration time in Positano & Amalfi. Be at pickup point by 8:50 — bring confirmation voucher!
info.zh: 已預訂行程：TRAMVIA - Beducci Travel Bus。團體巴士遊，在 Positano 同 Amalfi 自由活動。8:50前到接送點 — 記得帶確認券！

note.en: 🎫 Booked on GetYourGuide — booking ref GYGLMR2W6BK5 ✓ Booked
note.zh: 🎫 已喺 GetYourGuide 預訂 — 預訂編號 GYGLMR2W6BK5 ✓ 已預訂

name.zh: 阿納爾多·盧奇大道（TRAMVIA 接駁點）

hint.en: TRAMVIA Naples-Amalfi bus tour — booked, ref GYGLMR2W6BK5
hint.zh: TRAMVIA 拿坡里-阿馬爾菲巴士團 — 已預訂，編號 GYGLMR2W6BK5

activity.zh: 阿馬爾菲導賞團：⭐ 波西塔諾（自由活動約2小時）

info.en: Iconic pastel clifftop village — walk down to Spiaggia Grande beach, browse ceramic shops, grab a granita di limone
info.zh: 標誌性的粉彩懸崖小鎮 — 落山去 Spiaggia Grande 海灘、行陶瓷商店、嘆杯檸檬冰沙 granita di limone

comment.en: 📸 Best photo spot: lookout above the church dome with sea backdrop. Note: ~30min steep walk down to the beach (and back up!)
comment.zh: 📸 最佳拍照點：教堂圓頂上方的觀景台，以大海為背景。注意：去海灘要落山約30分鐘（返上嚟仲攰）

activity.en: Amalfi Tour: Fiordo di Furore (Photo Stop)
activity.zh: 阿馬爾菲導賞團：Fiordo di Furore 峽灣（影相停留）

info.en: Bus passes the dramatic hidden fjord between Positano and Amalfi — emerald water, iconic stone bridge. Photo stop depends on driver / traffic
info.zh: 由 Positano 去 Amalfi 途中經過呢個壯觀的隱世峽灣 — 翡翠碧水、標誌性石橋。是否停車視乎司機/交通

note.en: 📸 ~10min viewpoint stop on the SS163 coastal road
note.zh: 📸 SS163 海岸公路上約10分鐘觀景停留

activity.en: Amalfi Tour: ⭐ Amalfi Town (Free Time ~4h, includes lunch)
activity.zh: 阿馬爾菲導賞團：⭐ 阿馬爾菲小鎮（自由活動約4小時，包含午餐）

info.en: Visit the magnificent Amalfi Cathedral (Duomo), explore the narrow alleyways. Long free window — sit-down lunch with sea view, taste limoncello, optional walk to Atrani next door (~10min)
info.zh: 參觀宏偉的阿馬爾菲大教堂（Duomo），探索狹窄巷弄。長時間自由活動 — 邊吃午餐邊欣賞海景，試 limoncello，可選步行去隔壁 Atrani（約10分鐘）

comment.en: 🍽️ Lunch tip: scialatielli ai frutti di mare or grilled fish with lemon from local groves
comment.zh: 🍽️ 午餐推薦：scialatielli ai frutti di mare（海鮮意粉）或當地檸檬汁烤魚

activity.en: Amalfi Tour: 🚌 Bus Returns from Amalfi → Naples
activity.zh: 阿馬爾菲導賞團：🚌 巴士由 Amalfi 返拿坡里

info.en: 17:30 departure from Amalfi. ~2h drive back to Naples (depending on coastal traffic)
info.zh: 17:30 由 Amalfi 出發。返回拿坡里約2小時車程（視乎海岸交通）

note.en: 🚌 Be at pickup ~17:20 sharp — bus does not wait for latecomers
note.zh: 🚌 17:20 一定要到接送點 — 巴士唔等遲到嘅人

booking.description: Return bus included in TRAMVIA tour booking

activity.zh: 返到拿坡里 + 步行返 Airbnb

info.en: Drop-off back at C.So Arnaldo Lucci. Short walk or taxi back to Spaccanapoli Airbnb (~25min walk / ~€8 taxi)
info.zh: 落車地點返 C.So Arnaldo Lucci。步行/的士返 Spaccanapoli Airbnb（約25分鐘步行 / 的士約€8）

activity.zh: 拿坡里晚餐 — Tandem（拿坡里肉醬專門店）

info.en: Tiny Spaccanapoli spot specializing in genuine Neapolitan ragù — slow-cooked 6+ hours. Open late, no fuss, ~€15pp. Perfect after the long Amalfi day.
info.zh: Spaccanapoli 小店，專做正宗拿坡里慢燉肉醬（燉煮6小時以上）。營業至深夜，每人約 €15。Amalfi 長日歸來後最佳選擇。

comment.en: 📞 No bookings — walk in, expect a short wait.
comment.zh: 📞 不接受訂位 — 直接入店，可能需稍候片刻。

highlights.zh: 🚌 TRAMVIA 巴士遊 ✓ 已預訂

label.en: Tonight's Stay · Naples (night 4 of 4 — checkout tomorrow)
label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 拿坡里（第4晚／共4晚 — 明天退房）

name.zh: 拿坡里 Airbnb · Spaccanapoli 舊城區

stay.address: Via San Biagio dei Librai, 8 (3rd floor, first door right) · Napoli, Campania 80138, Italia

activity.zh: 酒店早餐

info.en: Fuel up for a full day of ancient history
info.zh: 為充實的古蹟一日遊補充能量

activity.zh: 🚄 Circumvesuviana 前往龐貝

info.en: Local train from Napoli Centrale to Pompeii Scavi station
info.zh: 從 Napoli Centrale 搭本地火車到 Pompeii Scavi 站

note.zh: 🚄 約40分鐘，約 €4 單程 | 每30分鐘一班

booking.description: Buy Circumvesuviana ticket at Napoli Centrale — €3.50

activity.zh: ⭐ 龐貝考古公園

info.en: Walk the streets of the ancient Roman city frozen in time by Mount Vesuvius in 79 AD — remarkably preserved houses, temples, theatres, and frescoes
info.zh: 漫步這座被維蘇威火山於公元79年凝固在時間中的古羅馬城市 — 保存驚人的房屋、神殿、劇場和壁畫

comment.en: 🏛️ Must-sees: Forum, House of the Faun, amphitheatre, Villa of the Mysteries. Allow 3-4 hours minimum!
comment.zh: 🏛️ 必看：廣場、牧神之屋、圓形劇場、秘儀莊園。至少預留3-4小時！

hint.en: Book online via parcoarcheologicopompei.it — saves queue
hint.zh: 透過 parcoarcheologicopompei.it 網上預訂 — 免排隊

activity.zh: 龐貝附近午餐

info.en: Local trattoria outside the park — try fresh buffalo mozzarella from nearby farms
info.zh: 公園外的當地餐館 — 必試附近農場的新鮮水牛芝士

activity.zh: Spaccanapoli 及拿坡里舊城區

info.en: Back in Naples — wander the narrow streets of the historic center, browse artisan shops, and soak in the atmosphere
info.zh: 回到拿坡里 — 漫步歷史中心的窄巷，逛手工藝品店，感受氛圍

name.zh: 斯帕卡那不勒斯（舊城區）

activity.en: ⭐ Last Naples Pizza Night — Pizzeria Sorbillo
activity.zh: ⭐ 拿坡里最後薄餅之夜 — Sorbillo

info.en: Gino Sorbillo on Via dei Tribunali — Michelin-listed, the Naples pizza pilgrimage. Margherita ~€5, queue is the rite. Different wing of Spaccanapoli from Day 4's Da Michele.
info.zh: Via dei Tribunali 街上的 Gino Sorbillo — 米其林指南推薦，拿坡里薄餅朝聖地。瑪格麗塔約 €5，排隊是儀式之一。位於 Spaccanapoli 另一端，與 Day 4 的 Da Michele 不同分區。

comment.en: 📞 No reservations for ground floor — arrive 19:30 to beat the line. Upstairs accepts bookings.
comment.zh: 📞 一樓不接受訂位 — 19:30 抵達避開人潮。樓上可預訂。

stay.address: Via Giulio Petroni, 14/E · Bari, Puglia 70124, Italia (~3 km SE of Bari Centrale)

activity.zh: 退房 — 拿坡里 Airbnb

info.en: Pack up, walk/taxi to Napoli bus station (Metropark Centrale, ~10 min)
info.zh: 收拾行李，步行或乘的士前往拿坡里巴士站（Metropark Centrale，約10分鐘）

activity.zh: 🚌 MarinoBus 拿坡里 → 巴里 ✓ 已預訂

info.en: Direct bus across southern Italy to Puglia. Free WiFi, comfortable seats
info.zh: 直達巴士穿越南意大利。免費 WiFi、舒適座椅

note.zh: 🚌 約3小時，每人 €14.83 ✓ 已預訂 | 約11:30 抵達巴里

hint.en: MarinoBus Naples → Bari already booked
hint.zh: MarinoBus 拿坡里 → 巴里 已預訂

activity.zh: 巴里午餐 — La Uascezze（舊城區）

info.en: Beloved osteria in Bari Vecchia — orecchiette alle cime di rapa, braciole al sugo, Puglian wines. Outdoor tables on a tiny piazza when sunny.
info.zh: 巴里舊城內的人氣 osteria — 蕪菁葉貓耳朵麵、肉捲蕃茄醬、普利亞葡萄酒。天氣好可坐戶外小廣場。

comment.en: 📞 Walk-in friendly at lunch; reserve for weekend dinners.
comment.zh: 📞 午餐通常可直接入座；週末晚餐建議預訂。

activity.zh: ⭐ 火車到 Polignano → 舊城區

info.en: 20min train from Bari → explore the dramatic clifftop old town — whitewashed buildings over the turquoise Adriatic. Visit the Domenico Modugno (Volare!) statue
info.zh: 從巴里搭火車約20分鐘 → 探索壯觀的懸崖舊城 — 白色建築矗立在碧藍亞得里亞海上。參觀 Domenico Modugno（Volare! 名曲）的雕像

name.zh: 波利尼亞諾阿馬雷（舊城）

hint.en: Buy regional train Bari→Polignano — €3, day-of
hint.zh: 區域火車 Bari→Polignano — €3，當日購票

activity.zh: ⭐ Lama Monachile 沙灘

info.en: The iconic beach between two cliffs — swim in crystal clear water under the historic Roman bridge. One of Italy's most photographed spots!
info.zh: 兩座懸崖之間的標誌性沙灘 — 在古羅馬橋下的水晶般清澈的海水中暢泳。意大利最上鏡的景點之一！

activity.zh: Polignano 懸崖海鮮晚餐

info.en: Stay in Polignano for sunset dinner! Try orecchiette, raw sea urchin, and local Primitivo wine. Donna Gina (Lama Monachile views) or Trattoria il Grottone (sea panorama). Train back to Bari after (~20min)
info.zh: 留在 Polignano 看日落晚餐！試試 orecchiette、生海膽和當地 Primitivo 紅酒。推薦 Donna Gina 或 Trattoria il Grottone。飯後搭火車回巴里（約20分鐘）

name.zh: 波利尼亞諾阿馬雷（懸崖餐廳）

hint.en: Reserve 1-2 days ahead — cliff-edge dinner spot
hint.zh: 提前1-2天訂位 — 懸崖邊餐廳

label.en: Tonight's Stay · Bari (night 2 of 2 — checkout tomorrow)
label.zh: 今晚住宿 · 巴里（第2晚／共2晚 — 明天退房）

stay.address: Via Giulio Petroni, 14/E · Bari, Puglia 70124, Italia (~3 km SE of Bari Centrale)

activity.zh: 普利亞式早餐

info.en: Pasticciotto (Puglia's famous custard pastry) and espresso
info.zh: Pasticciotto（普利亞著名的卡士達酥）和濃縮咖啡

activity.en: ⭐ Train to Polignano → Boat Tour (Sea Caves & Swimming)
activity.zh: ⭐ 火車到 Polignano → 遊船（海蝕洞及暢泳）

info.en: Train from Bari (~20min), then explore Polignano's stunning sea caves from the water — swim in hidden coves and see Lama Monachile from the sea!
info.zh: 從巴里搭火車（約20分鐘），再從海上探索 Polignano 壯觀的海蝕洞 — 在隱秘海灣暢泳，從海上欣賞 Lama Monachile！

name.zh: 波利尼亞諾阿馬雷（遊船）

hint.en: Book Polignano boat tour 1-2 days ahead via GetYourGuide
hint.zh: 透過 GetYourGuide 提前1-2天預訂 Polignano 遊船

activity.zh: Polignano 午餐

info.en: Fresh seafood at a cliff-edge restaurant — try the famous raw prawns of Polignano!
info.zh: 在懸崖邊餐廳享用新鮮海鮮 — 必試 Polignano 著名的生蝦！

name.zh: 波利尼亞諾阿馬雷（午餐）

activity.en: ⭐ Alberobello Guided Tour from Bari (UNESCO Trulli Houses)
activity.zh: ⭐ 阿爾貝羅貝洛導覽團（聯合國教科文組織 Trulli 石屋）

info.en: Unique whitewashed cone-roof trulli houses — nowhere else in the world looks like this! UNESCO World Heritage Site
info.zh: 獨一無二的白色錐頂石屋 — 全世界沒有第二個地方長這樣！聯合國教科文組織世界遺產

note.en: 🎫 Book on GetYourGuide — Half-day tour from Bari | Or FSE bus ~1h, €5-10
note.zh: 🎫 GetYourGuide 預訂 — 從巴里出發半日遊 | 或 FSE 巴士約1小時，€5-10

hint.en: Book guided Alberobello tour from Bari — half-day
hint.zh: 預訂從巴里出發的阿爾貝羅貝洛半日導覽團

activity.zh: 探索 Rione Monti（Trulli 石屋區）

info.en: Wander the iconic trulli streets, browse handmade souvenirs, taste local olive oil and wine
info.zh: 漫步標誌性的 trulli 街道，選購手工藝紀念品，品嚐當地橄欖油和美酒

activity.zh: 巴里告別晚餐

info.en: Bari Vecchia old town — orecchiette alle cime di rapa, burrata, focaccia barese, and taralli with a glass of Negroamaro. Puglia does food right!
info.zh: 巴里舊城區 — orecchiette alle cime di rapa、burrata、focaccia barese 和 taralli 配一杯 Negroamaro。普利亞美食名不虛傳！

hint.en: Reserve for last Bari dinner
hint.zh: 預訂巴里最後一頓晚餐

name.en: Champagne Palace Hotel · near Roma Termini
name.zh: Champagne Palace Hotel · 鄰近 Roma Termini

stay.address: Hotel Champagne Palace · Via Principe Amedeo, 82, 00185 Roma RM, Italia (200m from Termini)

activity.zh: 悠閒早餐

info.en: Last morning in Bari — enjoy a cappuccino & cornetto in the old town one more time
info.zh: 巴里最後一個早晨 — 在舊城區再享受一杯 cappuccino 和 cornetto

activity.zh: 巴里舊城漫步及紀念品

info.en: Stroll through Bari's old town — Basilica San Nicola, Cathedral, the Strada delle Orecchiette where nonne hand-shape pasta on doorstep tables. Pick up olive oil and taralli as souvenirs
info.zh: 漫步巴里舊城 — 聖尼古拉大教堂、主教座堂、Strada delle Orecchiette（耳朵麵小街），睇 nonne 在門口枱仔上手工搓麵。買些橄欖油同 taralli 作手信

activity.zh: 海濱大道散步及輕食午餐

info.en: Final stroll along the Lungomare seafront, then grab a panzerotto or focaccia barese (Bari's signature street food) — easy to eat on the go before bus departure
info.zh: 沿 Lungomare 海濱大道作最後散步，然後買個 panzerotto 或 focaccia barese（巴里招牌街頭小食）— 容易邊行邊食，趕上巴士出發

picture.alt: Check-out and walk to bus stop

activity.zh: 退房及步行去 FlixBus 站

info.en: Pick up luggage from accommodation and walk to Bari FS Park Via Capruzzi (FlixBus stop, ~5 min from Bari Centrale station — south side of the tracks)
info.zh: 由住處取行李，步行到 Bari FS Park Via Capruzzi（FlixBus 站，距 Bari Centrale 火車站約5分鐘 — 月台南面）

activity.zh: 🚌 FlixBus 巴里 → 羅馬（直達）

info.en: Direct FlixBus to Roma Tiburtina Bus Station — 5h 50m, free WiFi, USB charging, comfortable reclining seats. Booked!
info.zh: FlixBus 直達 Roma Tiburtina 巴士總站 — 5小時50分，免費 WiFi、USB 充電、舒適可調節座椅。已預訂！

hint.en: FlixBus Bari → Rome — booked, €14.66/person
hint.zh: FlixBus 巴里 → 羅馬 — 已預訂，每人 €14.66

activity.zh: 抵達羅馬 Tiburtina → 酒店

info.en: Off the bus at Roma Tiburtina Bus Station. Take Metro Line B (Tiburtina → Termini, 1 stop, ~5 min) then a short walk to Champagne Palace Hotel. Drop bags and freshen up
info.zh: 在 Roma Tiburtina 巴士總站下車。乘地鐵 B 線（Tiburtina → Termini，1 站，約5分鐘）然後短途步行到 Champagne Palace Hotel。放下行李，梳洗一下

activity.en: ⭐ Final Italian Farewell Dinner — Trattoria Vecchia Roma
activity.zh: ⭐ 義大利告別晚餐 — Trattoria Vecchia Roma

info.en: Family-run Esquilino trattoria since 1916, 5-min walk from the hotel. Cacio e pepe, amatriciana, abbacchio scottadito. The classic Roman send-off.
info.zh: 1916年創立的家族小館，位於 Esquilino 區，距酒店步行5分鐘。起司胡椒麵、阿瑪翠絲麵、烤羊排。最經典的羅馬告別餐。

comment.en: 📞 Reserve ahead — popular before train departures.
comment.zh: 📞 建議提前訂位 — 火車離站前人氣旺。

hint.en: Reserve ahead — popular before train departures
hint.zh: 提前訂位 — 火車離站前人氣旺

activity.zh: 🍦 義大利最後一口冰淇淋 — Giolitti（1900年創立）

info.en: Rome's most legendary gelateria, near the Pantheon — open till 1:30am, perfect post-dinner stroll. Order the cassata or pistacchio.
info.zh: 羅馬最傳奇的冰淇淋店，鄰近萬神殿 — 營業至凌晨1:30，晚餐後最佳散步終點。推薦 cassata 或開心果口味。

activity.zh: 早餐及最後漫步

info.en: Last Italian cappuccino & cornetto — afternoon flight means a relaxed morning!
info.zh: 最後一杯意大利 cappuccino 及 cornetto — 下午航班，早上可悠閒度過！

activity.zh: 🚕 前往羅馬菲烏米奇諾機場 (FCO)

info.en: Allow time for duty-free shopping — limoncello, olive oil, Italian chocolates!
info.zh: 預留時間逛免稅店 — limoncello、橄欖油、意大利朱古力！

note.en: 🚄 Leonardo Express to FCO: €14, 32min from Termini
note.zh: 🚄 Leonardo Express 到 FCO：€14，從 Termini 32分鐘

activity.zh: ✈️ 國泰航空 CX292

info.en: Rome (FCO) → Hong Kong (HKG) • Direct 11h
info.zh: 羅馬 (FCO) → 香港 (HKG) • 直航11小時

hint.en: Cathay Pacific CX292 — booked, confirmed
hint.zh: 國泰航空 CX292 — 已確認預訂

activity.en: ✈️ Cathay CX293 — HK → Rome (round trip incl. CX292 return)
activity.zh: ✈️ 國泰 CX293 — 香港 → 羅馬（來回機票，包括 CX292 回程）

info.en: HKG 23:50 (Jun 2) → FCO 06:30 (Jun 3). Return: CX292 Jun 13. Booking ref: E22Y7L.
info.zh: HKG 23:50（6月2日） → FCO 06:30（6月3日）。回程：CX292 6月13日。預訂編號：E22Y7L。

note.zh: 國泰來回 × 6（每人 HKD 8,265，預訂編號 E22Y7L）
